Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Dof Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Craig A. Block As Receiver

No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
